all.en: Attention all employees, contractors, and visitors at the Hudson Tower complex.
all.zh: Hudson Tower 大樓內所有員工、承包商與訪客請注意。

all.en: Our annual fire and emergency response drill takes place next Wednesday.
all.zh: 本年度消防與緊急應變演練將於下週三舉行。

all.en: The drill will begin promptly at ten in the morning.
all.zh: 演練將於上午 10 點準時開始。

all.en: When the alarm sounds, please stop all work immediately and remain calm.
all.zh: 警報響起時，請立即停止所有工作並保持冷靜。

all.en: Do not use the elevators under any circumstances during the drill.
all.zh: 演練期間，無論何種情況均不得使用電梯。

all.en: Proceed to the nearest emergency stairwell marked with green exit signs.
all.zh: 請依綠色出口指示牌前往最近的緊急樓梯間。

all.en: Walk in single file and keep the right side of the staircase open.
all.zh: 請成單列前進，並保持樓梯右側淨空。

all.en: Floor wardens wearing yellow vests will guide you to the exits.
all.zh: 穿黃色背心的樓層管理員將引導您前往出口。

all.en: Please follow their instructions without arguing or stopping along the way.
all.zh: 請聽從其指示，途中切勿爭論或停留。

all.en: Once outside, gather at the assembly point in Riverview Plaza.
all.zh: 抵達戶外後，請於 Riverview Plaza 集合點集合。

all.en: Locate your team leader and confirm that all colleagues are accounted for.
all.zh: 找到您的團隊領導，確認所有同仁均已到齊。

all.en: If someone is missing, notify the chief warden immediately.
all.zh: 若有人員失蹤，請立即通報總指揮。

all.en: Do not attempt to return to the building to collect personal items.
all.zh: 切勿嘗試返回大樓拿取個人物品。

all.en: Visitors should remain with their host throughout the entire drill.
all.zh: 訪客應全程跟隨接待人員。

all.en: Employees with mobility needs should use the designated refuge areas.
all.zh: 行動不便的員工應使用指定避難區域。

all.en: Trained responders will assist them in evacuation once the area is clear.
all.zh: 受訓救援人員將於區域淨空後協助其撤離。

all.en: The all-clear signal will consist of three short bell rings.
all.zh: 解除警報訊號為三聲短鈴聲。

all.en: Please wait for the signal before returning to your workstation.
all.zh: 請等待訊號後再返回您的工作崗位。

all.en: The total drill duration should not exceed forty-five minutes.
all.zh: 整場演練時間不應超過 45 分鐘。

all.en: A short debrief will follow in the main auditorium at noon.
all.zh: 中午將於大禮堂進行簡短的檢討會。

all.en: Your feedback helps us refine our evacuation procedures every year.
all.zh: 您的回饋有助我們每年精進撤離程序。

all.en: Participation is mandatory unless you are on approved customer-facing calls.
all.zh: 除核准的客戶通話外，全員均須參與。

all.en: Thank you for taking workplace safety seriously and supporting this exercise.
all.zh: 感謝您重視職場安全並支持本次演練。

all.en: For questions, please contact the Facilities Safety Office at extension 5500.
all.zh: 如有問題，請洽設施安全室分機 5500。
